name: analyze
description: Runs the source analysis pipeline for a configured package.

name: AnalysisComponent
description: Describes one React component and its extracted props.

name: AnalysisExport
description: Describes one exported declaration discovered in a package.

name: AnalysisResult
description: Complete analysis output used to build the documentation model.

name: defineParadoxConfig
description: Defines a Paradox configuration object without changing its shape.

name: ParadoxConfig
description: Configuration for running Paradox against a TypeScript package.

name: buildModel
description: Converts analysis output into a serializable documentation model.

name: DocumentationModel
description: Serializable model consumed by renderers and writers.

name: render
description: Renders the documentation model into README and artifact files.

name: RenderResult
description: Rendered documentation files ready to be written to disk.

name: write
description: Writes generated documentation artifacts to the configured output paths.
